title: EffectorType
description: Parameter set for one interceptor effector type. SCOPE: parameters only — no fire-control code, no hardware integration, no RF waveform design. P_k values are abstract kill probabilities used by the allocator's cost-exchange optimisation.

cost_usd.description: Unit cost of one interceptor round (USD, for cost-exchange ratio)

p_k_table.description: Kill probability keyed by threat_type string: e.g. {"quadrotor": 0.85, "fixed_wing": 0.70, "rf_dependent": 0.05}

min_engagement_angle_rad.description: Minimum aspect angle for valid engagement geometry

soft_kill_only.description: EW-effect type: no kinetic impact, kill is probabilistic on RF-dependent threats only
